title: Exact Rational Polynomial Factorization Checks

solver_reuse.target: fixed rational quadratic discriminant QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact polynomial replay computes discriminant(x^2 + 1) = -4, while the malformed rational-linear-factor row requires the discriminant to be nonnegative.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional polynomial-factorization rows only when they add distinct coefficient, discriminant, root, division, GCD, square-free, or irreducibility pressure; keep arbitrary-field factorization theory in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode fixed rational factorization, division, GCD, and square-free rows as deterministic exact-rational obligations.
Replay SAT witnesses through Axeyum model evaluation over normalized coefficient lists.
Keep fixed discriminant obstructions tied to source-linked QF_LRA/Farkas evidence after exact replay computes the discriminant.
Add emitted QF_NRA/SOS or algebra-specific certificates for broader no-factor rows once proof routes are promoted.
Keep arbitrary-degree factorization, irreducibility over arbitrary fields, UFD/PID theorems, and algebraic-closure results under Lean horizon until formal routes exist.
